nextEvent.title: Your Next Event
nextEvent.description: Your next upcoming event appears here. Tap it to see details, RSVP, or check who's coming.

stats.title: Your Stats
stats.description: Your key numbers at a glance — teams, upcoming games, and total events. Tap any stat to jump to that section.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.description: Find a game nearby, create your own event (training, game, or social), or browse teams to join — all from here.

games.title: Games & Events
games.description: Games looking for players, match proposals, and your upcoming events all show up here. Join a game with one tap.

feed.title: Activity Feed
feed.description: Recent activity from your teams: new events created, match results, and team announcements.

tabs.title: Event Tabs
tabs.description: Switch between events you're attending, events you organized, and new events to discover and join.

filters.title: Filter by Type
filters.description: Filter by Training, Game, or Social. You can also filter by sport to find exactly what you're looking for.

viewToggle.title: List or Calendar
viewToggle.description: Switch between list and calendar views to plan your week at a glance.

eventList.title: Event Cards
eventList.description: Each card shows the event type, date, location, and spots left. Tap any event to see details and RSVP.

createButton.title: Create an Event
createButton.description: Tap + to create a new event: training session, competitive game, or social meetup.

tabs.title: My Teams & Discover
tabs.description: See your teams or discover new ones to join. Switch between the two tabs.

invitations.title: Team Invitations
invitations.description: Pending team invitations appear here. Accept or decline with one tap.

teamCard.title: Team Card
teamCard.description: Each card shows the team sport, member count, and description. Tap to enter the team.

createTeam.title: Create a Team
createTeam.description: Start your own team and invite friends by email, link, or username.

header.title: Your Profile
header.description: Your avatar, username, and founding member badge. Tap the camera icon to change your photo.

stats.title: Your Stats
stats.description: Teams, games played, games this month, and wins — all in one row.

tabs.title: Profile Tabs
tabs.description: Edit your personal info, check your activity history, or adjust app settings like language and theme.

share.title: Share Profile
share.description: Share your profile link with friends so they can find you on Athletica.
